message:
✨ Previous channel toggle + audio track auto-select

- Previous channel: simple A↔B toggle (Backspace or swap button)
- Auto-select first audio track on stream open (fixes missing audio)
- No-audio indicator (red mute icon) in preview info bar
- hasAudioStream and audioTrackCountStream on PlayerService

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
